company.name: Mainline Plumbing Co.
company.footer_blurb: Family-run plumbing serving Rockville and Montgomery County since 2008. We answer the phone, show up on time, and price it before we start.

hero.lede: Leaky water heater? Slow drain? A faucet that's been on your list for months? Licensed Mainline plumbers do clean, code-correct work across Rockville — and tell you the price before we start.
hero.image_alt: Mainline plumber repairing a copper supply line under a sink

services_section.heading: From a dripping faucet to a whole-house repipe.

services.title: Leaks & pipe repair
services.card_blurb: Slab leaks, pinhole copper, failing supply lines. We find it, stop it, and dry you out.
services.page_lede: A small drip can rot a subfloor or spike a water bill long before you see a puddle. We track leaks down to the source — slab, wall, supply line or fitting — fix them right, and show you the price before any work starts.
services.image_alt: Plumber repairing a leaking pipe under a sink
services.section_heading: Find it, stop it, dry it out.

features.title: Leak detection
features.body: Acoustic and moisture-meter location so we open the wall in one spot, not five.

features.title: Slab & pinhole leaks
features.body: Pinholes in old copper and under-slab lines repaired or rerouted to last.

features.title: Supply line failures
features.body: Burst or split lines, frozen-pipe damage, and corroded fittings swapped clean.

features.title: Upfront pricing
features.body: Flat quote in writing before we cut, solder, or open anything up.

signs.title: Water bill jumped
signs.body: A spike with no change in use almost always means a hidden leak.

signs.title: Warm spot on the floor
signs.body: A warm patch on a slab can mean a hot-water line leaking underneath.

signs.title: Stains or musty smell
signs.body: Ceiling rings, bubbling paint, or a damp, musty closet or cabinet.

services.cta_body: Send a few details and a licensed Mainline plumber will get back to you the same business day with next steps and a price range.

services.title: Water heaters
services.card_blurb: Tank swaps and tankless installs, repairs and flushes. No hot water? We'll sort it.
services.page_lede: No hot water, rusty water, or a tank that's puddling on the floor? We repair what's worth repairing and replace what isn't — gas, electric, or tankless — and size it right for your house so you're not paying to heat water you don't use.
services.image_alt: Newly installed water heater with clean connections

features.title: Tank replacement
features.body: 40–75 gal gas and electric swaps, hauled-away old unit, code-correct venting.

features.title: Tankless installs
features.body: Endless hot water and a smaller footprint — sized, vented, and permitted right.

features.title: Repairs & flushes
features.body: Thermocouples, elements, valves and anode rods — plus flushes to fight sediment.

features.title: Repair-or-replace advice
features.body: An honest read on whether a fix is worth it — no pressure to replace a good tank.

services.signs_heading: Signs your heater's on the way out.

signs.title: Lukewarm or no hot water
signs.body: Often a heating element, thermocouple, or sediment buildup.

signs.title: Rusty or smelly water
signs.body: Rust-colored hot water usually means the tank is corroding inside.

signs.title: Water around the base
signs.body: A leaking tank doesn't get better — plan a replacement before it fails.

services.cta_body: Tell us the heater's age, fuel type and what it's doing, and we'll come out with the right parts — and a flat price — the same business day.

services.title: Drains & sewer
services.card_blurb: Clogs, backups, camera inspection and trenchless sewer repair — without tearing up the yard.
services.page_lede: A slow drain is annoying. A backed-up sewer line is an emergency you can see and smell. We clear the clog, then put a camera down the line so you know whether it was grease, roots, or a broken pipe — and fix the cause, not just the symptom.

features.title: Drain cleaning
features.body: Kitchen, bath, laundry and main-line clogs cleared with the right tool for the line.

features.title: Camera inspection
features.body: We send a camera down the line and show you the real problem on screen.

features.title: Trenchless sewer repair
features.body: Spot repairs and pipe lining that fix the line without trenching your whole yard.

features.title: Root & grease removal
features.body: Mechanical cutting and hydro-jetting to clear roots and built-up grease for good.

services.signs_heading: Signs it's more than a clog.

signs.title: Multiple slow drains
signs.body: When several fixtures back up at once, the main line is usually the culprit.

signs.title: Gurgling toilet
signs.body: Bubbling or a toilet that drops when you run the sink points to a venting or main-line issue.

signs.title: Smell or yard sogginess
signs.body: A sewage smell or a wet patch in the yard can mean a cracked sewer line.

services.cta_body: Tell us which fixtures are affected and we'll bring the right gear to clear it — and a camera to find out why it happened.

services.title: Repipes
services.card_blurb: Trading out old galvanized or failing poly for clean PEX or copper — quoted to the dollar.
services.page_lede: Brown water, weak pressure, and leaks that keep coming back are signs the pipes themselves are failing. We replace old galvanized and problem-era poly with clean PEX or copper — pull the WSSC permit, do it in stages so you keep water, and patch the drywall so you'd never know we were there.
services.image_alt: Freshly soldered copper pipework after a repipe
services.section_heading: New pipes, quoted to the dollar.

features.title: PEX or copper
features.body: We walk you through the trade-offs and price both, so you choose with the numbers in front of you.

features.title: Permits & inspection
features.body: WSSC permit pulled and the work inspected — done by the book, on record.

features.title: Staged so you keep water
features.body: We plan the cut-overs so your home isn't without water overnight.

features.title: Drywall patched
features.body: Access holes closed and patched clean, ready for paint — not left for you to deal with.

signs.title: Discolored water
signs.body: Brown or yellow water at the tap is a classic sign of corroding galvanized pipe.

signs.title: Pressure keeps dropping
signs.body: Galvanized scales up inside over decades and slowly chokes off flow.

signs.title: Repeat leaks
signs.body: Once one section fails, the rest of the same-age pipe is usually close behind.

services.cta_body: Tell us your home's age and what you're seeing at the tap. We'll come measure, talk options, and put a fixed repipe price in writing.

services.title: Fixtures & faucets
services.card_blurb: Toilets, sinks, disposals, hose bibs — and the new faucet that's been in the box for months.
services.page_lede: The new faucet that's still in the box. A toilet that runs all night. A disposal that finally gave up. These are the jobs that never quite make it to the top of the list — so let us knock them out in one clean visit, sealed right and tested before we leave.

features.title: Faucets & sinks
features.body: Kitchen and bath faucets, sinks and supply valves swapped and sealed leak-free.

features.title: Toilets
features.body: New toilets set on fresh wax, plus repairs for runners, rockers and weak flushes.

features.title: Garbage disposals
features.body: Jammed, leaking, or humming-but-dead disposals repaired or replaced same visit.

features.title: Hose bibs & valves
features.body: Outdoor spigots, shutoff valves and ice-maker lines — frost-proof and tidy.

signs.title: We'll install your fixture
signs.body: Already have the faucet or toilet you want? We'll install what you bought.

signs.title: Or we'll supply it
signs.body: Not sure what to get? We'll bring quality fixtures that fit your space and budget.

signs.title: Old parts hauled away
signs.body: We take the old fixture and packaging with us — nothing left in your driveway.

services.cta_heading: Got a list of small jobs?
services.cta_body: List what you need swapped or fixed and we'll quote it together — often knocked out in a single visit.

services.title: Remodel rough-in
services.card_blurb: Kitchen and bath remodels, additions, ADUs — WSSC-code rough-in your inspector will pass.
services.page_lede: Whether it's a single bath refresh or a full addition, the plumbing behind the wall decides whether the finish goes smoothly. We rough-in supply, drain and vent to WSSC code, coordinate around your other trades, and stick around through finish so fixtures land clean and the inspection passes the first time.
services.image_alt: Plumbing rough-in for a bathroom remodel

features.title: Kitchen & bath remodels
features.body: Relocate sinks, tubs, showers and toilets — laid out for the design you actually want.

features.title: Additions & ADUs
features.body: New supply, drain and vent runs for additions, basements and accessory units.

features.title: Permitted to WSSC code
features.body: Permit pulled, rough-in and final inspections handled — no scramble at the finish line.

features.title: Trade coordination
features.body: We schedule around your GC, framer and tile crew so the job keeps moving.

signs.title: 1 · Rough-in
signs.body: Supply, drain and vent run and pressure-tested before walls close, then inspected.

signs.title: 2 · Finish & set
signs.body: We return after tile and paint to set fixtures, connect, and test everything.

signs.title: Clear scope up front
signs.body: You get a written scope and price so the remodel budget holds.

services.cta_body: Share your plans or even a rough sketch and timeline. We'll talk through the layout and put a rough-in price in writing — no pressure.

steps.title: Tell us what's wrong
steps.body: Send the quote form or call. We'll ask a few questions and book a visit — usually within a day or two.

steps.title: Flat price, in writing
steps.body: We diagnose on site and quote the whole job before any work starts. You approve, then we begin.

steps.title: Fixed & cleaned up
steps.body: We finish, test it twice, haul the old parts, and back the work with a one-year warranty.

reviews.name: Dana R.
reviews.quote: Our heater quit on a Tuesday. Mainline came out the next morning, gave me the price before touching anything, and had hot water back by lunch. Clean, polite, no upsell. Exactly what you want.

reviews.name: Marcus T.
reviews.quote: Old galvanized pipes, brown water, the works. They repiped the whole house in PEX, pulled the WSSC permit, and patched the drywall so well you'd never know. Worth every dollar.

reviews.name: Priya L.
reviews.quote: They ran a camera first instead of guessing, showed me the root intrusion on screen, and did a trenchless repair. No torn-up lawn, honest crew. I've already passed their number to two neighbors.

gallery_section.heading: Tidy copper, clean joints, no mess left behind.

images.alt: Freshly soldered copper manifold in a utility room
Newly installed water heater with clean gas and water connections
Plumber finishing a clean under-sink repair

quote_section.heading: Tell us what's going on.
quote_section.lede: Fill this out and a real Mainline plumber — not a call center — gets back to you, usually the same business day.

steps.title: You send the details.
steps.body: The more you tell us, the tighter the estimate.

steps.title: We reply with a price range.
steps.body: And book a visit at a time that works for you.

steps.title: Flat quote on site.
steps.body: Approved before any work begins. The estimate is free.

area_section.heading: Rockville and all around it.
area_section.blurb: Based in Rockville, we cover most of Montgomery County. Not sure if you're in range? Send the form and we'll tell you straight.
area_section.image_alt: Map showing the Montgomery County, Maryland service area
